commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And those that worship the host of heaven upon the housetops; and those that worship and that swear by the LORD, and yet swear by Milcom; Houses. The roofs were flat. Josias afterwards reformed this abuse, 4 Kings xxiii. (Calmet) It continued among the Arabs. (Strabo xvii. The idol of the Ammonites. (Challoner) Those who join idols with God do not worship Him indeed. (Worthington) Swearing was an act of religion, Matthew v. God will not allow his glory to be given to another. Such lame worship or divided hearts he rejects, 3 Kings xviii.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Melchom: The idol of the Ammonites.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
